overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy climbing a vegetated cliff face, then traversing through a dense tropical forest during golden hour, concluding with a glide using the shield wing into a darker ravine. The video showcases high-fidelity game engine rendering with dynamic lighting and lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep vegetated cliff face with large tropical leaves

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky cliff face using handholds and footholds among dense vegetation

entered.detail: steep rock wall covered in vines and vegetation
large tropical leaves with distinctive holes
dense greenery at the top of the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows Aloy ascending a steep cliff face covered in dense tropical vegetation. Large monstera leaves frame the climb as the character moves upward toward the cliff edge, with warm golden hour lighting illuminating the rock surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with scattered trees and red undergrowth

events.description: reaches the top of the cliff and transitions to running on flat forest ground

agents.ego_description: running through the forest clearing navigating around trees and colorful foliage

entered.detail: tall trees with thick trunks scattered throughout the clearing
green grass covering the forest ground
mountain range visible on the horizon with pink sunset lighting

segments.scene_description: Having reached the cliff top, the scene opens into a sunlit forest clearing with scattered tall trees and patches of red foliage. The character runs across the grassy floor with distant mountains visible in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with thick canopy cover

events.description: entering denser tree canopy causing light to become more diffused and shadowed

agents.ego_description: moving through dense undergrowth and between large tree trunks

entered.detail: thick tree trunk with detailed bark texture
thick patches of ferns covering the forest floor
rocky mountains illuminated by warm sunset colors

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest where the canopy thickens and the lighting becomes more diffused. Large tree trunks and dense ferns dominate the scene as distant mountains remain visible through gaps in the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark dense jungle with rocky outcrops and narrow passages

events.description: deploys shield wing glider and descends through the canopy
lands and enters narrow rocky ravine with steep walls

agents.ego_description: gliding down from a height using the blue energy shield wing, then landing and continuing through narrow rocky terrain

entered.detail: blue energy glider deployed for descending through the air
narrow gap between rock walls with dense vegetation

segments.scene_description: In the darkest section of the forest, the character deploys a glowing blue shield wing to glide down through the dense canopy. After landing, the scene transitions to a narrow rocky passage with steep walls and thick undergrowth, significantly darker than the earlier sections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sun-drenched cliff ascent into the deepening shadows of a tropical ravine. It begins with a climb up a steep, vegetated cliff face framed by large monstera leaves under the warm glow of the golden hour. As the character reaches the summit, the view opens into a bright forest clearing with red foliage and distant mountains before shifting deeper into the woods where the canopy thickens and the light becomes diffused among dense ferns. The scene then transitions into the darkest part of the forest as a glowing blue shield wing is deployed to glide through the trees, finally descending into a narrow, dim rocky passage enclosed by steep walls and thick undergrowth.
